untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom pattern requires visual/geometric detection (converging then diverging trendlines forming a diamond shape). This is a chart pattern recognition task that cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, and position indicators. Pattern detection would require candlestick sequence analysis, support/resistance line fitting, or specialized pattern recognition algorithms not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The signal describes a technical chart pattern (Diamond Bottom) with volume characteristics. While volume diminishing over time and jumping on breakout could theoretically be captured (volume < previous volume, then volume > 4x previous), the core requirement—detecting the geometric diamond shape formed by converging then diverging trendlines—is not expressible. UPTREND_REVERSAL added as target_regime based on signal intent, though this regime is not in the ALLOWED_REGIMES list.
